name: Stewed Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring the water to a simmer in a saucepan.
2. Add the tomatoes, scallions, and green pepper. Allow the mixture to simmer, covered, for 40 minutes.
3. Stir in the corn meal, dillweed, fresh basil, and sunflower seed butter. Mix thoroughly to break up the softened tomatoes.
4. Cover and simmer for another 10 minutes. Serve hot.
1/10 of the recipe (serves: about 5 servings)
Food Exchange per serving: 2 VEGETABLE EXCHANGES CAL: 57; CAR: 11g; PRO: 2g; CHO: 0mg; FAT: 1.5g; SOD: 22mg
